sprint_goal:
Sprint 1 goal: Build the multi-tenant foundation for PulseDesk.
project root - E:\forge2-pulsedesk-starter-kit\forge2-Sh
[1:22 PM] :white_check_mark: *Sprint Plan*

1. Organization & User Models with Migrations
2. Auth API Endpoints (Register, Login, Logout)
3. EnsureSameTenant Middleware
4. Pest Feature Tests — Auth & Cross-Tenant Isolation

These are the goals

tasks.title: Organization & User Models with Migrations
tasks.description: Create Organization and User models, migrations, and relationships. Organization is the tenant root; User belongs to Organization. Add unique constraints on organization slug and user email per tenant. Include hasMany / belongsTo relations and fillable casts.

tasks.title: Auth API Endpoints (Register, Login, Logout)
tasks.description: Implement Sanctum-based auth controllers for register, login, logout. Registration creates Organization + User together. Issue plain-text token via Sanctum. Add routes under api/v1 and request validation classes.

tasks.title: EnsureSameTenant Middleware
tasks.description: Create middleware that resolves the tenant from the authenticated user and guards against cross-tenant data access on tenant-scoped resources. Register it in Kernel and apply to tenant-scoped route group.

tasks.title: Pest Feature Tests — Auth & Cross-Tenant Isolation
tasks.description: Write Pest feature tests covering registration, login, logout, and cross-tenant isolation scenarios using RefreshDatabase and model factories. Assert users cannot access other organizations' resources.
